steps.title: Find the shared category
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between first position in Vaganova method ballet and demi-seconde position in Royal Academy of Dance ballet. The notes show that both are positions for a dancer's arms; the details about how the arms are shaped are differences, not the requested similarity.

steps.title: Reject contrasts and omissions
steps.content: Choice B wrongly puts both positions in Royal Academy of Dance ballet. Choice C emphasizes how the arm positions differ. Choice D mentions only Vaganova first position. The answer is A.
